name: Single filer at high income in Neuchâtel (high-tax canton)
description: Single person earning CHF 200,000 in Neuchâtel, one of the highest-tax cantons

sources.description: Neuchâtel has among Switzerland's highest tax rates
sources.notes: Cantonal: bracket_tax (50k×12% + 100k×17% + 50k×20% = 33,000). Federal ~10,811 on taxable income. Social 6.12% (unemployment capped at 148,200).
